hero.name: Rusbel
hero.description: Frontend Developer specialized in React. I focus on creating modern, fast interfaces and high-quality web experiences.

about.title: About Me
about.p1: I am a Dominican web developer passionate about technology and creating modern, fast, and responsive interfaces. I enjoy building digital experiences that are intuitive and efficient for users.
about.p2: I consider myself a dreamer, with a creative mind and great motivation to constantly learn and face new challenges in the world of web development.
about.quote: "My goal is to continue growing as a developer and create projects that add real value to people."
